picks.why: She thanked Musk for saving America — weeks before she began claiming his companies threaten humanity.
She wrote that Musk has “an incredible vision for humanity” and said she could not thank him enough for transforming X.
Her own standalone post: “Elon Musk is a hero.”
Not a reply. Not a retweet. Her own words: “Elon Musk is the greatest war general in modern history.”
She called Musk’s purchase of Twitter/X “the single greatest thing to happen for free speech on internet.”
